name: Darius Star: Cyber Coelacanth
description: Automation tasks for asset linting, build verification, and deployment

lint.description: Check for missing asset references in index.html and validate sprites.json entries

output.failure: Missing asset references found. See output above.

output.failure: Deploy failed. Check git status and remote.
